tools.name: list-boards
tools.description: List all boards accessible to authenticated user

tools.description: Get details of a specific board

tools.description: Update board properties (name, description, background, etc)

tools.description: Get all lists in a board

tools.description: Create a new list in a board

tools.name: update-list
tools.description: Update a list (change color, name, position, etc)

tools.name: list-cards
tools.description: Get all cards in a list

tools.name: get-card
tools.description: Get details of a specific card

tools.name: create-card
tools.description: Create a new card in a list

tools.name: update-card
tools.description: Update a card (move to different list, change name, description, etc)

tools.name: add-comment
tools.description: Add a comment to a card

tools.name: get-card-actions
tools.description: Get actions/activity history for a card

tools.name: list-labels
tools.description: List all labels on a board

tools.name: create-label
tools.description: Create a label on a board

tools.name: add-label-to-card
tools.description: Add a label to a card

tools.name: remove-label-from-card
tools.description: Remove a label from a card

tools.name: search
tools.description: Search for cards across all boards
